content:
First set \(n=[r]\in\mathbb Z_{\ge0}\) and \(f=\{r\}\in[0,1)\).  Then the equation becomes
\[
25f+n=125,
\]
so
\[
f=\frac{125-n}{25}.
\]
Since \(0\le f<1\) we need
\[
0\le\frac{125-n}{25}<1
\quad\Longrightarrow\quad
100<n\le125,
\]
i.e. \(n=101,102,\dots,125\).  For each such \(n\),
\[
r_n=n+f=\;n+\frac{125-n}{25}=\frac{24n+125}{25}.
\]
Hence the total sum is
\[
\sum_{n=101}^{125}r_n
=\sum_{n=101}^{125}\frac{24n+125}{25}
=\frac{24\sum_{n=101}^{125}n+125\cdot25}{25}.
\]
But
\[
\sum_{n=101}^{125}n=\frac{(101+125)\cdot25}{2}=2825,
\]
so
\[
\sum r_n
=\frac{24\cdot2825+125\cdot25}{25}
=\frac{67800+3125}{25}
=\frac{70925}{25}
=2837.
\]
Therefore the required sum is \(\boxed{2837}.\)
